Localization.Description: Possible exploitation of vulnerabilities CVE-2023-34051, CVE-2022-31706, and CVE-2022-31704. This allows an attacker to execute an arbitrary code on a host. The attack consists of several steps: bypassing authentication, uploading a malicious PAK file using REMOTE_PAK_DOWNLOAD_COMMAND, and launching an update using PAK_UPGRADE_COMMAND

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: Possible exploitation of vulnerabilities CVE-2023-34051, CVE-2022-31706, and CVE-2022-31704 in Aria Operations for Logs on host {event_src.host}
